form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 2150m at Bendigo, at the bell was 4th-7.99 beaten 19 m by Major Max (2:44.10) in NR up to 36 on April 8 at $21. Before that, 5th (Fr1) over 1755m at Echuca beaten 17 m by Jilliby Topgun (2:12.40) in NR up to 42 on April 5 at $61. In the mix from the inside draw.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4 m second behind Major Max at Bendigo over 2150m NR up to 36 last start. Before that was beaten 4.5 metres second at Echuca over 1755m in NR up to 42 on April 5. Racing well and is a winning chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground and tired over the concluding stages of the race to be beaten 67m.
Commenced to tire leaving the 600m mark to be beaten 46.5m.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1690m at Maryborough, at the bell was 2nd-4.8 beaten a head by Playa Del Carmen (2:07.00) in NR up to 36 on March 30 at $34. Sure to be about the mark again.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr1) over 1690m at Maryborough, at the bell was 9th-16.9 beaten 17 m by Karakajack Tooth (2:06.10) in 2-3 WINs on April 10 at $151. Before that, a solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr6) over 2080m at Cranbourne, at the bell was 4th-13.2 beaten 10 m by Jays All That (2:41.20) in 0-2 LTW TROT on April 3 at $26. Top-three finish is well within his grasp.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Failed to be in position at the start.
Pulled hard while racing outside the leader during the middle stages.
Hung in and contacted marker pegs approaching the 900m mark.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (FT Fr1) over 2180m at Stawell beaten 35 m by Kamaran (2:51.00) in No NR on April 3 at $6. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (FT Fr2) over 2570m at Ararat, beaten 35 m by Kamaran (3:23.50) in No NR on March 23 at $23. Not out of the equation.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up before using the sprint lane.
Tightened and crowded for room approx 225m when Mi Bow hung inwards.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into eleventh after a quick start, behind With Aplomb at Maryborough over 2190m in a NR up to 55 M on April 10 at $126. Performed better the start before with a good run when 3rd (Fr4) over 2150m at Bendigo was leading by 0.52 at the bell, beaten 18 m by Major Max (2:44.10) in NR up to 36 on April 8 at $7.50. Genuine contender in this suitable contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Trotted roughly under pressure near the finish.
Utilised sprint lane in the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 1690m at Kilmore beaten 3.5 m by Patnwill (2:09.20) in NR up to 39 on February 12 at $8. At the run before 6th (Fr2) over 1710m at Ballarat, at the bell was 9th-20.7+m beaten 15 m by Noble Count (2:06.50) in NR up to 49 on January 8 at $51. Hard to leave out.
